debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

failed_attempts:
have hf : 0 < (k.factorial : ℚ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr k.factorial_pos
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [div_eq_mul_inv, le_mul_inv_iff_mul_le hf]
    norm_cast
    rw [mul_comm, ← Nat.descFactorial_eq_factorial_mul_choose]
    exact Nat.descFactorial_le_pow n k
  · refine div_le_div_of_le_left (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (pow_pos (by norm_num1) _) ?_
    norm_cast
    cases k with
    | zero => simp
    | succ k =>
      induction k with
      | zero => simp
      | succ k ih =>
        rw [Nat.succ_sub_one, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.factorial_succ]
        exact le_trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 ih) (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.le_add_left _ _))
